name: Form Control
description: A wrapper that provides label, helper text, and error messaging for form fields.

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the field as required. Propagated to child input and label.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field as invalid. Propagated to child input; switches helper → error text.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the field. Propagated to child input.

slots.name: helper
slots.description: Muted helper text below the input (hidden when `invalid` with error slot).

slots.name: error
slots.description: Red error text below the input (shown only when `invalid`).

slots.name: counter
slots.description: Right-aligned text below the input (e.g. character count "12/100").
